projects.name: Pet Grooming Website
projects.description: Designed UI/UX focusing on user experience and intuitive interface. Utilized ReactJS to build reusable components and ensure responsive design. Delivered a demo product with a user-friendly interface, optimized performance, and scalability.

projects.name: Call Center – Enterprise Communication System
projects.description: Contributed to UI/UX design, feature development, and system testing. Completed a Call Center system with a friendly interface, enabling call management and integration with VoIP infrastructure.

projects.name: Motorbike Rental Management System
projects.description: Built the user interface using C# WinForms, including login, vehicle management, billing, and admin modules. Designed and implemented business logic for rental/return tracking, billing, and customer management. Managed SQL Server database and performed comprehensive testing.
